hero_sub: Developer & creator working on Self-Engine — a system for managing time, projects, and finances with clarity.
currently_building_desc: Self-Engine — a personal productivity app for time tracking, project management and financial clarity.
currently_learning_desc: Buddhism, meditation, and the art of doing less, better.
currently_moving_desc: Training consistently. The body is part of the system.
projects_sub: Things I build and care about.
se_desc: A personal productivity system — track time, manage projects, understand your finances, visualize your calendar. Built for people who want to work with intention.
about_p1: I'm Gwydion — a developer, thinker, and builder from Germany. I spend most of my time working on Self-Engine, a tool I started building because I couldn't find anything that fit the way I think about time and work.
about_p2: I care deeply about open source, intentional systems, and the intersection of technology and inner life. Buddhism shapes how I approach both code and everyday existence — with patience, presence, and an eye for what's essential.
about_p3: Outside of the screen: I train, I read, I sit in silence. These aren't hobbies — they're part of the system too.
contact_sub: Got a project in mind, want to collaborate, or just want to talk? I'm reachable.
contact_success: Message sent. I'll be in touch.
blog_sub: Thoughts on systems, open source, mindfulness, and the craft of building software.
blog_coming_soon: Posts are coming. Check back soon.
